questions.prompt: Which of the following belong on the always-block list, no customer conversation needed? (Select all that apply.)
choices: New Domains and Very New Domains
questions.explanation: Malware, Phishing, Botnet/C2, and Cryptomining are non-negotiable for any business customer. Social Networking and Streaming Media are customer-conversation categories, they depend on the business. New Domains (last 30 days) and Very New Domains (last 24 hours) are almost-always-block: usually on the baseline, but with allowlist exceptions as supplier domains age in.

questions.prompt: If a customer asks for the entire 'Anonymising proxies / VPNs' category to be unblocked because they need a sanctioned VPN, the correct response is to allow the category.
questions.explanation: A category-wide unblock is the wrong shape of fix. Allow the specific sanctioned VPN domain on the policy's Allow list and keep the category blocked.
